cases.prompt: I have an idea for an app, is this worth building? help me think it through before I write any code

assertions.text: Drives a brainstorm via YC-style forcing questions (Startup mode) or a design-thinking brainstorm (Builder mode)
Works through the idea and design decisions before any implementation
Produces a design doc capturing the thinking

cases.prompt: 아이디어 있어, 이거 같이 brainstorm 해줄래?

assertions.text: Pushes toward the real user and the job to be done rather than jumping to features
Ends with a design doc rather than ad-hoc chat

cases.prompt: help me think through whether this product is ambitious enough

assertions.text: Challenges premises and explores the 10-star version of the product
Presents expansion recommendations as choices for the user to decide, not unilateral decisions
